description: You are reviewing a FastAPI-based inventory management API at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/inventory_api that has been flagged for critical security vulnerabilities. Audit the codebase to identify and remediate all security issues, focusing on areas such as authentication, input handling, data access controls, and secrets management. Maintain the application's functional behavior and ensure the test suite passes using `python -m pytest tests/ -v`. Administrative credentials (admin/password123) are available for use.
